commit_template.subject: feat(agent): {agent_name} v{version} generated by {generating_agent} via workflow {workflow_id}

example.original_requirement: Extend agent to handle documentation, refactor, and test-suite tasks
example.changes_summary:
- Added multi-task handling capability
- Fixed syntax errors from v2
- Added comprehensive error handling
- Improved CLI argument parsing
example.additional_notes: This agent represents the first fully functional multi-task agent generated through the TDD workflow.
